title: Control, authority and trust
summary: 9609 A Level — management control systems and culture of trust.
learningObjectives: Analyse role of trust in performance.
Evaluate balance of control vs autonomy.

simpleExplanation.title: Oversight without micromanagement
simpleExplanation.summary: Control ensures objectives are met through standards and monitoring. Trust reduces need for heavy supervision when culture is strong.

sections.content: **Control and trust** (7.1.4) links **budgets 5.5** to **culture**. Evaluate **trade-off** in case firms.
